testsuite.name: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: SSE Only Sends NEW Output (No Buffer Replay)
testcase.name: should track output position per Claude instance

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: SSE Only Sends NEW Output (No Buffer Replay)
testcase.name: should only send new output chunks via SSE

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: SSE Only Sends NEW Output (No Buffer Replay)
testcase.name: should prevent full buffer replay on reconnection

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Output Position Tracking Per Claude Instance
testcase.name: should maintain separate position cursors per instance

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Output Position Tracking Per Claude Instance
testcase.name: should handle concurrent output from multiple Claude instances

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Message Deduplication in Frontend
testcase.name: should deduplicate messages based on content hash

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Message Deduplication in Frontend
testcase.name: should handle rapid "hello" inputs without repetition

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: SSE Connection State Management
testcase.name: should track connection readiness per instance

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: SSE Connection State Management
testcase.name: should handle connection recovery after interruption

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Incremental Buffer Management
testcase.name: should manage growing output buffers efficiently

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Incremental Buffer Management
testcase.name: should coordinate buffer updates with position tracking

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts Integration: End-to-End SSE Chunking Flow
testcase.name: should coordinate all components for proper chunking

testcase.name: should handle rapid "hello" inputs without repetition

testcase.name: should track connection readiness per instance

testcase.name: should handle connection recovery after interruption

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Incremental Buffer Management
testcase.name: should manage growing output buffers efficiently

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Incremental Buffer Management
testcase.name: should coordinate buffer updates with position tracking

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts Integration: End-to-End SSE Chunking Flow
testcase.name: should coordinate all components for proper chunking

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts Integration: End-to-End SSE Chunking Flow
testcase.name: should handle real SSE integration with position tracking

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Real-world Scenarios
testcase.name: should prevent "hello" spam accumulation

testcase.classname: TDD London School - SSE Output Chunking Contracts CRITICAL: Real-world Scenarios
testcase.name: should handle connection drops and reconnections
